From Healthcare Operations To Digital Marketing

Hi, I'm the founder of Regtek Consulting. Before I ran digital marketing campaigns, I ran operations for a healthcare clinic that grew from a single location to five offices and achieved Inc 5000 recognition.

Here's what I learned during that journey: marketing isn't just about getting clicks. It's about understanding your entire business model, your operations, your capacity, your customer lifetime value, and your growth constraints.

Most agencies don't think about those things. They optimize for conversions without asking if you can handle more customers. They run ads without understanding your margins. They chase vanity metrics instead of revenue.

That's why I started Regtek. To bring operational expertise to digital marketing. To be a true strategic partner, not just an ad buyer.
What I Bring To Your Business
A unique combination of operational experience, digital marketing expertise, and technical skills.


Healthcare Operations Experience

Scaled clinic from 1 to 5 locations
Achieved Inc 5000 fastest-growing company recognition
Deep understanding of medical practice economics
Patient lifetime value optimization

Operational constraints and capacity planning
Digital Marketing Expertise
Google Ads management and optimization
Meta Ads strategy and execution
Website design and conversion rate optimization
Advanced tracking and attribution modeling

Multi-channel campaign coordination
Technical Skills
Custom domain and email setup
Web hosting, security, and SSL certificates
Google Business Profile optimization
Call tracking and analytics integration

HIPAA-compliant marketing infrastructure
Strategic Consulting
Business model optimization
Pricing strategy development
Customer acquisition cost analysis
Lifetime value maximization strategies

Growth constraint identification and solutions
Regtek

Data-Driven Marketing. Real Results.


Named after our founder's best friend
